_comment: UNSMOKED — pre-staged 2026-07-04. Target: fit Qwen2.5-Coder-32B (4-bit QLoRA) at seq_len 2048 on a 24GB 4090 by offloading checkpointed activations to CPU (the term that OOMs in backward). ZeRO stage 0 = NO weight sharding/offload (keeps the 19GB of 4-bit weights resident on GPU, avoids the ZeRO-3 / 4-bit conflict). RISK: HF Trainer's gradient_checkpointing uses torch.utils.checkpoint, not DeepSpeed's checkpoint fn — cpu_checkpointing may be silently ignored unless the model's checkpointing is rewired to DeepSpeed's. Smoke after the 14B CPT frees the GPU; if cpu_checkpointing doesn't engage, fallback is lower seq_len (planner shows 32B fits native at ~256).
